textByHashes.3be7be5d8dbce7eb949ab5d7052a2fb91124ddb9: You mind your business, I'll mind mine.
textByHashes.50cb589193046960000cfabb1cac1f8ab8c1861f: If you want to stay healthy you'll leave now.
textByHashes.5ffb8c80fc737eff6d9c666bf2978cc29cdd8e60: So... that two faced cold hearted snob has made you fall for his propaganda eh?
textByHashes.acfcc7d7709cb32a8b21cdf39c9a1351b589cab6: Is he now? Is he REALLY? There is a lot more to the Carnilleans than meets the eye you fool...
textByHashes.220455af814a7eef6f90a5f00cdb5622d4713801: And none of it is honourable.
textByHashes.19a50402f5403282ad9daff38e2686a18e12fb09: The Carnillean home does not belong to them. The builder of the house was Lord Hazeel, one of the Mahjarrat followers of Zamorak. Many years ago there was a civil war
textByHashes.92a0bacba52203262f774be1f734f2f68e1ed191: in this land, and the hateful Saradominists declared war upon all Zamorakians who lived here. Lord Hazeel nobly would not repent his beliefs, and the Carnilleans harrassed
textByHashes.861bfcad5027b8597e978befd533d91e3ccb8362: Hazeel and his followers for many decades. One fateful night, under cover of darkness, they stormed his home in an angry mob torturing and butchering all loyal
textByHashes.c00c0a8097c6af8707cb449c50a6949279216f27: Zamorakians they encountered inside. The following morning, the Carnillean forefathers moved into the empty household and claimed it as their own.
textByHashes.1243a57683a12af2f2d5ee99b160fd3f72747ad7: They have grown fat on the hard work of Lord Hazeel ever since. Unluckily for them Lord Hazeel as a Mahjarrat had access to powers and enchantments they knew nothing
textByHashes.a21cce6b377da405986a3260e89433dc92224357: about, and made preparations for his return when first they began to storm his home. Soon the day will come when he will return to wreak his vengeance upon the thieves!
textByHashes.08f2db995291b52451859f38dda546c3d463112e: Well then friend, perhaps I can offer you a different job then? Sooner or later Our master WILL return to this land; those faithful to him will be well rewarded.
textByHashes.804c928e80e3c21c689cdd90de1013db9242c795: Join our cult and assist us in his restoration, and you will be well rewarded; try and prevent his return and suffer the wrath of Zamorak and the Mahjarrat.
textByHashes.6b904af209689b880152e2818663c7b6534d4702: Then you are a fool. Go back to your small minded mundane little life; you will never know the glories you could have tasted as one of us!
textByHashes.4a06ffd2a46dc5f7353fdc80bd7946a5237aec62: You must prove your loyalty to our cause. Killing one of the Carnillean household should be sufficient proof of your dedication to resurrecting our master Lord Hazeel.
textByHashes.cef6660fd795fb53111b282ce74f9f8c97d70179: So what say you adventurer? Join our side against the Carnillean thieves?
textByHashes.de6cb169649c1540bfe23c6def8aaa715083355f: Then you are a fool. Go back to your small minded, mundane little life; you will never know the glories you could have tasted as one of us!
textByHashes.3c1ffe36bd0c4448ad33224032ab2b8dcb2518c9: Excellent. It takes a rare character to see through the cursed Carnillean lies. I can tell you are a man of exactly the right character to join the followers of Hazeel.
textByHashes.67bff17cd428611fdff69495f26a13b451395253: Excellent. It takes a rare character to see through the cursed Carnillean lies. I can tell you are a lady of exactly the right character to join the followers of Hazeel.
textByHashes.3b7891c298a7418a465c7c1da387f7adbb1d5f3d: Here. Take this poison. Pour it into their food, and once the deed is done, return here and speak to me once more.
textByHashes.554319fb0ec4f4e1a462a9dc9445678f5fcfc1fd: So. You've returned. Now do you want to know the truth about the 'honourable' Carnilleans?
textByHashes.341ce826cb7349656acda95c6cfac3ef0eacc238: You're more of a fool than you look if you think you will ever find it. When Lord Hazeel is revived you will be first to grovel for his mercy!
textByHashes.f5fa00a62e39176f2a0ad776b948c4899a5fa45c: You again! You meddle in our affairs too much! When Lord Hazeel returns to this realm he will lay a mighty vengeance upon you!
textByHashes.4261422a2bc469b8ddf2453284ca06a4e7816569: You again. Mark my words meddler; when Lord Hazeel returns you will be punished most severely for your interference in our schemes.
textByHashes.21e448ac4a8b96fde234b5e02cd6f4ff577e025f: You have a mission for us adventurer. Go to the Carnilliean household and poison their meal to prove your loyalty.
textByHashes.fb78a94bd0b165932e4d53a15f90ad1f7626861b: Useless. Take this and don't mess up this time. Lord Hazeel is depending on you.
textByHashes.62a14068acc2bcab1a1c7f27fe3009e68fd86608: Yes, we heard all about it from one of our sources. Hazeel has eyes everywhere! You have now proved your loyalty and will be rewarded when Hazeel is revived!
textByHashes.3f577759fef68079d60f23464fb2b5b4d40d859f: Here. Wear this amulet; it is called The Sign Of Hazeel. Not only will it identify you as one of our brotherhood to other followers but it is also key to finding our hideout.
textByHashes.6728733a50d2c78363917aaed98fd8ded291b41d: But of course, you already knew that, as you already have The Sign Of Hazeel.
textByHashes.1516235af61fe6e3b29d737e061f0d24db5948c5: Hazeel in his wisdom when he built this lair did so by making it inaccessible unless the flow of the sewers is controlled exactly by the sewer valves above ground.
textByHashes.f87b27471cc8e56ee378d86f5fd55ccd959222e1: Each sewer valve must be correctly set before the water level is such that you may enter. The secret of the correct settings is contained in these amulets which honour him.
textByHashes.651e7d32c841b0e5d71d785c153a56de9c961def: Starting from left to right, follow the design of the amulet to locate each sewer valve, and then turn each so as to follow the amulet design.
textByHashes.33e8fdde2d3c0f2a58e6fe3a91bb7e08363bf633: When you solve the sequence you may enter our hideout where our leader, Alomone, awaits you.
textByHashes.54fadcd2d836a3467ff8371392c860a08127fba8: Hello once more adventurer. All we need is Hazeels' magical scroll to bring him forth once more to this world.
textByHashes.a360d559b2c0914151cd68f737639826d3c4a083: Have you acquired the enchanted scroll required to resurrect Hazeel yet?
textByHashes.2ee6555ec8684e08738fa382e6142bf9ac89c58b: At last! The pieces are all in place for the glorious resurrection of Lord Hazeel! Now is the starting point for a new page in history, and our chance for vengeance!
textByHashes.820bdc7bd6b9c9ba3aeb14c38ac5005bcc4ed246: Quickly now! Take the scroll to Alomone so that we may begin the ritual... and when Lord Hazeel returns I promise you that you shall be well rewarded!
textByHashes.567b1a4a05a3869ca6c91fca5d1685f45b11ab23: Incompetent cretin! Return to the Carnillean household and do not return again without it!
textByHashes.109df9c70afbbf3e6fe24887e5e61ddfb63f4f53: Hey! I don't remember saying you could use that raft!
textByHashes.c3bc70af1d36fed64cc758f95f67dd4836eab18b: You can call me Clivet. What do you want, adventurer?
textByHashes.9329cf432f516322cca0459b2f1cd253ed979d60: Carnilleans? Don't think I've ever heard of them.
textByHashes.ca239c928555c7cf12824a7b285e5440c3e07208: Is that so? In that case, I'd say you'd be wise to leave now.
textByHashes.a1c580e9d7bcd976453e3005adf530fc04c79ac0: Ah, I see. That two-faced snob has made you fall for his propaganda, eh?
textByHashes.690596c6a7bf0be847204ec4cb6edeaa9f7be8bf: The Carnillean home does not belong to them. It was built long ago by the great Lord Hazeel, who once ruled over this entire region.
textByHashes.ec7edb67bde7ac478586aea3de7289debd2a6c24: Many years ago, the Carnilleans led a rebellion against Lord Hazeel and all who followed him. Under the cover of darkness, they stormed his home in an angry mob, torturing and butchering everyone they found.
textByHashes.0920c15c46b23d760ecc5be059e8c9253f905f12: The following morning, the Carnillean forefathers moved into the empty household and claimed it as their own. They have grown fat on the hard work of Lord Hazeel ever since.
textByHashes.866575256a09eed43849b6b875dc7e96fecc2fbc: The foolish Carnilleans believed him dead. Unluckily for them, being an all-powerful Mahjarrat gave him access to powers and enchantments they knew nothing of.
textByHashes.7fb701a6cea99238fd2e14852db3648356da99e7: As they stormed his home, Lord Hazeel made preparations for his eventual return. We, his faithful followers, have been working to bring that about ever since.
textByHashes.7b6e115f628b98dd9c20ab0419e841d837996ec0: I could kill you right now and be done with it, but I don't think you're the fool that the Carnilleans believe you to be. Instead, I offer you a chance to join us.
textByHashes.686a10003f3ce4a195b2f9bb8891e57fb1872c57: Help us bring about the return of Lord Hazeel, and you will be well rewarded. However, should you continue to try and prevent his return, you will suffer the wrath of Zamorak.
textByHashes.0b8e5764a1ef0600efb55ba7cb464a0a06ac75d5: Lord Hazeel is one of the great Mahjarrat who once fought alongside Zamorak himself. He ruled this region for many years, until the cowardly Carnilleans rebelled against him.
textByHashes.5e049e0e7a23f4d2ae0026c299a74868b3954911: Of course! The Mahjarrat know magic that others can only dream of. Lord Hazeel used his abilities to ensure that one day he'd eventually return. That day will soon be upon us.
textByHashes.fb80751baf63c354ac39a131f0edf96f16dcbca7: The Carnilleans served the pathetic Saradomin. They considered it their duty to overthrow Hazeel due to his loyalties to Zamorak. They were fools, blinded by Saradominist propaganda!
textByHashes.a9cfb07c89ad1a80522beef8035a1fa8e7e63b2b: Yes! Something even more prevalent today. Too many people now are fooled into believing that Saradomin is a god of good, while Zamorak is evil. Those lies couldn't be further from the truth!
textByHashes.be0bf500b7e48bcfa36db29fdd19aa131c4b61a2: There is something we need inside. I will say no more unless you agree to join us.
textByHashes.40342c18bca042ca65344370835b4248d2e453d0: Surely you have heard of the Mahjarrat? Their race is the ultimate example of power! Each of them wields the strength of an entire army. To oppose any one of them, is to face your doom!
textByHashes.8e00c56565c42d11017669fd114874ffb43dddd1: More than that! Hazeel is one of the greatest Mahjarrat to have ever lived!
textByHashes.1f59d91415515e77b6b0aa521df990ba67bc569b: Then we have nothing more to discuss until you've made your choice.
textByHashes.510fd0160aa1de1e3e16b859d02f7134cc80fd06: Good. Now, we are not the monsters that the Carnilleans would claim we are, so we were hoping to do this without violence. However, the fact they sent you here makes it clear that won't work now.
textByHashes.a0ede656803bad16a8dd4f6f76f3d8b2920bcb20: You must prove your loyalty to our cause, and Ceril Carnillean must die. Kill him for us, and we will know you are truly dedicated to Lord Hazeel.
textByHashes.6abab007cb2fdb1be45bfc507f3b7f0e3ca2ff2a: I can already tell I was right about you. I can see you are of exactly the right character to join the followers of Hazeel.
textByHashes.0647742a3c7641e2d2fea73509b3feaa15c6eb5f: Here, take this poison and pour it into Ceril Carnillean's food. Once the deed is done, return here and speak to me once more.
textByHashes.2eecfca322c583eb6c0c213457ad1e7c488ae877: Then you are a fool. Go back to your small-minded little life. You will never know the glories you could have tasted as one of us!
textByHashes.db0cdd946f87f8dc78868670a41bcd3aed5012d4: You'll try, but you'll never find us.
textByHashes.7e7d74e41014238900e7a045339faebe0cde7f0c: So, you've returned. I hope you're here because you've recognised the folly in serving the Carnilleans. Think about what you could achieve if you join us instead.
textByHashes.d29f728c8c01627b2fe212eaab8fc23ca20ae8e7: You! Leave this place at once, before we're forced to make you!
textByHashes.4527327c40271622d8e1382652248f5902cd4530: Here's that poison you need. Take it and pour it into Ceril Carnillean's food. Once the deed is done, return here and speak to me once more.
textByHashes.45cfd9b74abb0c032159d5ceef0a79748ca7c413: You have a mission for us, adventurer. Go to the Carnilliean household and poison Ceril Carnillean's meal to prove your loyalty.
textByHashes.c626c229cc9b4c6b7c89d050d5969dc4b09e8a1d: Fool! Be more careful with it this time.
textByHashes.401640417dc975eccebd75f5f5797bbe97a8c55c: Yes, we heard all about it from one of our sources. It's a shame that Ceril Carnillean survived, but that is no fault of yours. You have proven your loyalty to Hazeel.
textByHashes.8d14fa45e3e1049f1b01446a5b81b9f6f1a2718b: I would like you to meet with our leader, Alomone. You'll find him in our hideout, deeper in the sewers. You can use this raft to get there.
textByHashes.e54cd124a0a5e3b8f7a5f6b2c0e68cfaa94b67a7: However, be warned that reaching the hideout is impossible unless the flow of water down here is set correctly. You'll need to use the sewer valves above to do that.
textByHashes.87ecdba4cc235c4aff2bd877c3fe09c7035c023e: Going from left to right, turn each of the five sewer valves above so that they follow the design of the amulet. Once you've done that, you'll be able to use the raft here to enter our hideout.
textByHashes.61cc3d9736dca0d218abd89fb3cb71ead1495c30: Use the raft here to enter our hideout and meet with our leader, Alomone.
textByHashes.f35603884bfe8a20a4812f334e15009ba83970a3: Be warned, you'll need to ensure the flow of water down here is set correctly for you to be able to use the raft.
textByHashes.ee6951c663606265c6684a5e5fcdbba424a84479: Going from left to right, turn each of the five sewer valves above so that they follow the design of the amulet I gave you.
textByHashes.81d443ba62fd3553b9b2b9d21b453bfab7b90958: It is good to see you once more, adventurer. Glory to Hazeel!
textByHashes.a8ccf70258295be8b5da1114a302c00cbe40deac: Lord Hazeel, this is the adventurer who killed Alomone and got Jones captured.
textByHashes.e1a8626f7773e3c1c5a7a908c2fbd7974eae32fa: Whoever this person is, they must be an ally to us, my lord.
textByHashes.b5f472baac396659914cc017cffdee425e605e76: Lord Hazeel has given you a task to perform. Go and get it done.
textByHashes.3835844454f6a680e20d0ea1583d09a71497d28e: Have you completed your task? Speak with Lord Hazeel and General Khazard if so.
textByHashes.390ed44daf12b104bbb512b1fd6dabbac0f115b8: Lord Hazeel and General Khazard require you in the north. Meet with them at the troll settlement there. Now be gone.
textByHashes.58c6d4308a6ae30687fc6c8b8286d254e191b248: You have no business here. Leave now.
